name: Brandon King Land Surveying
description: Family-owned land surveying firm serving western Wisconsin and eastern Minnesota since 2008, specializing in land surveying, land use plans, elevation surveying, site planning, and resurveying.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: With nearly 20 years of experience, you know that their work is honest, and done right!

sentiment.summary: Brandon King Land Surveying has a strong positive reputation, with reviewers praising their honesty, experience, and quality workmanship built over two decades.
